title: Infini - Rekt
relevance_summary: Admin privileges exploited after transfer to a developer who vanished with large funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers admin privileges to a new address within a short timeframe

red_flags: Transfer of admin privileges to a new address shortly after contract deployment
Long hibernation period followed by rapid fund withdrawal
summary: Infini's founder transferred admin privileges to a developer who later vanished with $49.5 million. A guard could have detected this by blocking transfers of admin privileges to new addresses within a short timeframe.
